---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or extension to the framework
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed feature or improvement.

---

## Motivation

Why would this change improve the AI Philosophical Framework?

Examples:

- clearer ontology
- improved schemas
- better AI integration
- additional examples
- research extension

---

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed change as clearly as possible.

Examples:

- new schema
- ontology extension
- documentation improvement
- new use case
- new validation rule

---

## Affected Area

Which part of the repository is affected?

- docs
- ontology
- schema
- examples
- prompts
- spec

---

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or examples that support the proposal.
